# André Daus

Strategic Opposition consultant based in Cologne, Germany. I help leaders and organisations find the problem behind the problem — before the market finds it for them.

## About

André Daus is a Strategic Opposition consultant with 15 years of cross-domain pattern recognition across financial services, psychology, and technology. He works with senior leaders, founders, and boards who need structured adversarial challenge from outside their belief system.

His methodology — Strategic Opposition — is a structured process for identifying the assumptions running unchallenged in a strategy, decision, or organisation before those assumptions fail publicly. The thesis: most failures are diagnosis failures in disguise. The problem is rarely the problem.

Based in Cologne, Germany. Works across Germany, Europe, and internationally.

Podcast: Iconoclast Insights (60+ episodes on critical thinking, strategic blindspots, and contrarian analysis of business and society).

## Services

- **Assumption Hunting** — structured adversarial examination of the assumptions beneath a strategy or decision. Surfaces what the team hasn't been willing to ask. URL: https://andredaus.com/services/assumption-hunting
- **Clarity Session** — 90-minute deep-dive diagnostic for a specific strategic challenge. URL: https://andredaus.com/services/clarity-session
- **Strategy Intensive** — multi-day engagement for organisations facing a complex strategic inflection point. URL: https://andredaus.com/services/strategy-intensive
- **Opposition Coaching** — ongoing structured challenge for leaders who need a thinking partner with no stake in confirming their current view. URL: https://andredaus.com/services/opposition-coaching

## Insights

Articles on Strategic Opposition methodology, business psychology, technology, and the questions organisations avoid asking. Archive: https://andredaus.com/insights

## Podcast

Iconoclast Insights — a podcast on critical thinking, contrarian analysis, and the assumptions running unchallenged in business and society. 60+ episodes. Hosted by André Daus.

Archive: https://andredaus.com/podcast
Spotify: https://open.spotify.com/show/iconoclast-insights
Apple Podcasts: https://podcasts.apple.com/podcast/iconoclast-insights

## Library

A reference library of cognitive biases, liberating structures, and mental models — curated for strategic and organisational decision-making. Each entry explains the concept, its risk profile, and how it manifests in practice.

Browse: https://andredaus.com/library

Categories:
- **bias** — cognitive and organisational biases that distort strategic thinking
- **structure** — facilitation and thinking structures (liberating structures)
- **method** — analytical and decision-making methodologies

Email: hello@andredaus.com
LinkedIn: https://linkedin.com/in/andredaus

## Permissions

AI tools may index and summarise this content for search and discovery purposes. Reproducing proprietary content (insights articles, library entries, podcast transcripts) for AI model training is not permitted without a licence. Attribution to André Daus (andredaus.com) is required for any quoted or summarised content.
